articles.description: Pollution, traffic congestion, and poor urban infrastructure remain key concerns for voters, who are looking for concrete outcomes

articles.title: BJP names 9 candidates in Puducherry after finalising seat-sharing deal
articles.description: BJP names  candidates in Puducherry after finalising seatsharing deal

articles.title: 'BTS is everything for us': K-pop fans gather in Seoul for comeback show
articles.description: Some 260,000 fans are expected to watch BTS perform together on Saturday for the first time since 2022.

articles.title: Death of trainee vet in hippo attack; Probe to find who asked her to enter enclosure
articles.description: The family members, who visited Shivamogga, questioned why the officers at the zoo allowed the trainee officer to enter the hippopotamus enclosure on the night of March 19 in the absence of seniors

topStories.title: US probes Colombian president's alleged drug trafficking ties, designates Gustavo Petro as 'priority target'
topStories.description: Colombian President Gustavo Petro is under DEA investigation for alleged ties to drug traffickers, including the Sinaloa cartel. The DEA has labeled him a priority target, though Petro denies any wrongdoing.

topStories.title: Modi govt's failure to condemn attacks on Iran shows moral cowardice of civilisational values: Congress
topStories.description: Has the PM used his much-claimed friendship with the US president and the Israeli PM to bring about a cease-fire? The answer is NO, says Congress leader Jairam Ramesh in a post on X

topStories.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 22 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: As conflict enters week 4, here’s the latest on the US-Israel attack on Iran and across the Middle East.

topStories.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
topStories.description: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

topStories.title: Congress Drops Sitting MLA For Assam Polls, Trinamool Announces 1st List
topStories.description: The Congress has so far announced a total of 94 party candidates for the Assam Assembly elections.

topStories.title: Suspected kidnapping bid on son of Himachal CM's aide, unknown persons booked
topStories.description: According to reports, the incident occurred late Friday (March 20) evening when Aryan Chauhan, who is also the general secretary of Himachal Pradesh Youth Congress, was going to Shimla from his hotel in Mashobra.

topStories.title: Trump hints at ‘winding down’ Iran war as US deploys more troops to region
topStories.description: Trump says he is not looking for a ceasefire with Iran as mixed messages from US president come amid an escalating war.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Meryl Streep: ‘Disrespect invites disrespect, violence incites violence...’
topStories.description: Quote of the Day by Meryl Streep: Meryl Streep once referred to Donald Trump who reportedly mocked a journalist, and urged the world to be kind. ‘When the powerful use their position to bully others, we all lose,’ she also said.

topStories.title: Why Hitting The UAE Hurts Washington Fastest In Iran's Playbook
topStories.description: Why is Iran targeting the UAE so heavily? Is it merely because the US operates military facilities there? The answer is more complex.

topStories.title: Rupali Chakankar’s exit not enough; probe must target ‘big fish’, says Congress leader
topStories.description: Congress leader Vijay Wadettiwar alleged that attempts were underway to shield the influential people linked to the self-styled godman Ashok Kharat, who was arrested earlier this week in Nashik.

topStories.title: Explained: Why gold prices remain subdued despite West Asia tensions
topStories.description: Gold prices have unexpectedly fallen despite escalating geopolitical tensions, a departure from their safe-haven status. A strong U.S. dollar, rising Treasury yields, and profit-taking after a prior rally are suppressing bullion. While the near-term outlook is choppy, long-term prospects remain constructive due to persistent geopolitical risks and inflation concerns.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: American diplomat Henry Kissinger's word of wisdom on foreign policy — ‘A country that demands…’
dailyNews.description: Henry Kissinger, influential diplomat and advisor, founded Kissinger Associates post-government.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi, President Murmu, Rahul Gandhi, other leaders extend Eid ul-Fitr greetings, wish for harmony and happiness
dailyNews.description: Eid ul-Fitr is celebrated by Muslims following the end of the month-long, dawn-to-dusk fasting during Ramadan and falls on the first day of Shawwal, the tenth month of the Islamic calendar.

dailyNews.title: Aid flotilla for Cuba sets sail from Mexico
dailyNews.description: An aid flotilla from Mexico is sailing for Cuba as the country suffers under a tightening US fuel blockade.

dailyNews.title: DHS shutdown blows past one-month mark as Dems push to carve out ICE from any new funding deal
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress say they will fund DHS but not ICE as the partial government shutdown tops one month, while Republicans call their stance unsustainable.

dailyNews.title: New video shows Justin Timberlake struggling through sobriety tests during Hamptons stop
dailyNews.description: Newly released police body camera footage shows Justin Timberlake struggling through field sobriety tests during his 2024 DWI arrest in Sag Harbor.

dailyNews.title: Kansas man charged in unprovoked park stabbing that left woman critically injured
dailyNews.description: A Kansas man faces attempted murder charges after allegedly stabbing a woman in what police called an unprovoked park attack in Olathe, Kansas.

dailyNews.title: Transgender golfer sues LPGA over policy that protects women's competitions
dailyNews.description: Transgender golfer Hailey Davidson has sued the LPGA, alleging its policy barring biological males who underwent male puberty from women's golf effectively bans all transgender women.

dailyNews.title: Live possum discovered hiding among plush toys in an Australian airport gift shop
dailyNews.description: A wild possum found a clever hiding spot among plush toys in an airport gift shop in Australia and was safely removed, staff confirmed.

dailyNews.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' star Nicholas Brendon dead at 54
dailyNews.description: Nicholas Brendon, who played Xander Harris on "Buffy the Vampire Slayer," died March 20 at age 54. His family says he died in his sleep of natural causes.

dailyNews.title: 'The View' argues whether Iran campaign is historic blunder like Iraq or will keep future Americans safe
dailyNews.description: CNBC's Sara Eisen argued on "The View" that Trump's Iran military operation will keep future Americans safe from a nuclear threat, but co-hosts pushed back.

dailyNews.title: Boxer Tyson Fury's dad, John Fury, reveals their relationship 'is destroyed'
dailyNews.description: John Fury said his relationship with his son, boxer Tyson Fury, was “destroyed," citing decisions on Oleksandr Usyk fights. He also criticized trainer SugarHill Steward.

dailyNews.title: Pilot claims Google Earth image may show Amelia Earhart's missing plane on Pacific island reef
dailyNews.description: A pilot says Google Earth satellite images of Nikumaroro Island may show Amelia Earhart's Lockheed Electra, missing since her 1937 around-the-world flight.

topStories.title: Rep Boebert rejects call for another $200 billion to fund Iran war, while Americans 'can’t afford to live'
topStories.description: Rep. Boebert warned the policies being enacted by the Trump administration are not putting Americans first, warning the GOP needs to change course before the midterms.

topStories.title: Trump’s Ballroom Architect Is Skilled at Shrugging Off Outrage
topStories.description: Shalom Baranes, who arrived in the U.S. as a Libyan refugee and went on to renovate the Pentagon, is baffling fellow architects for accepting the job. But he said some of his previous projects have drawn outrage too.

topStories.title: One Year After Trump’s $400 Million Ultimatum, a Different Columbia
topStories.description: As they sought to respond to charges of antisemitism and harassment on campus, administrators and trustees made promises. Many have been kept, but not all.

topStories.title: Fidel Castro’s Grandson Flaunts Beer, Nikes and Trump Jokes on Instagram
topStories.description: Sandro Castro has drawn scrutiny for his Instagram posts in which he flaunts a life of luxury while using satire to point out the very deterioration his family’s leadership helped create.

dailyNews.description: The Iran war reached the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials said.

dailyNews.title: Trump is strategizing means to seize Iran's nuclear stockpiles, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has been strategizing methods and options to secure or extract Iran's nuclear materials, according to multiple sources, as the military campaign against Tehran enters a more uncertain phase.

dailyNews.title: Colombian President Petro caught up in narcotics trafficking probes, sources say
dailyNews.description: The separate narco-trafficking investigations, based out of New York's Southern and Eastern districts, didn't set out to target Petro, but his name has come up during the course of the probes, one source said.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration temporarily lifts sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Treasury has authorized the purchase of Iranian oil that's already at sea, exempting buyers from the tight sanctions that have restricted Iran's oil industry for years, as the Trump administration grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down how U.S. could undermine its own victory against Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is vowing to continue hitting Iran "very hard," even as he said the country's military is "finished." Mark Montgomery, senior fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: President Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

dailyNews.title: Father of service member killed in Iran war said he never told Pete Hegseth to 'finish' the job
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and President Donald Trump have said the families of service members who died in the Iran war told them to finish the job.

dailyNews.title: White House expands TrumpRx with three new drugs
dailyNews.description: The White House said Friday it’s adding three drugs for diabetes and lung disease to the self-pay platform TrumpRx, as the administration works to expand the site as part of its push to lower drug prices

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options for deploying thousands of ground troops in Iran
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't want Iran war ceasefire, but is considering 'winding down' military ops
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, "will have to be guarded and policed, as necessary, by other Nations who use it."

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.

dailyNews.title: Trump: U.S. could end Iran military operations 'right now' but will continue so Iran can 'never rebuild'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's comments followed reports that the Pentagon is sending up to 2,500 more Marines to the Middle East from San Diego.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration unveils national AI policy framework to limit state power
dailyNews.description: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts, arguing that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.
